spec_match.rationale: The demo accurately compares four legacy text-fitting workarounds with their native text-fit equivalents.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactivity with individual width sliders and Old/New toggles for each card, updating preview styles and code dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb perfectly matches the content and purpose of this migration diff demo.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers multiple distinct legacy patterns and provides clear technical explanations for why text-fit is superior.

references.rationale: The page is completely missing the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system, utilizing appropriate colors, fonts, and layouts.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: The page is missing the required reference link to `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5104141688635392`. It should be added to a 'see also' or references section to conform to the repository rules.

summary: An outstanding comparison demo that clearly articulates the benefits of migrating to native text-fit. It features excellent interactive controls, but fails on the mandatory repository rule to include a ChromeStatus reference link.
